subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever drunk and wilt ever continue to drink, and cause others to drink, from the sweet-flowing stream of divine knowledge of the Eternal Beloved [3.5s]... ...The never-ending sprinkling of the showers of Revelation fall continuously from the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree, and are made manifest in Words and revealed in the Holy Tablets
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال از زلال سلسال معارف محبوب لایزال بنوشی و بنوشانی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @methods of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation
